_comment: Bucket dictionary for /z-plan. The planner never eyeballs token counts (ESTIMATION.md: 'this is arithmetic, so compute it'). It picks ONE tier per ticket by the ESTIMATION.md model rules-of-thumb, copies that tier's entry verbatim into a buckets.json, and shells it to bin/z-estimate for the dollar figure. Same tier -> same buckets -> same z-estimate output, so estimates are reproducible across runs (issue #7 AC2). Each tier's buckets are directional full-lifecycle volumes (plan + build + QA + review + merge, per ESTIMATION.md step 3). tests/plan-schema.test.ts pins the resulting dollar total of every tier so a rate or bucket change fails the gate instead of silently drifting from SKILL.md.
